MEGATRON VS THE RABBOT by Thunderstarwarp reviews
When the Rabbot returns to the Aqua Teens after Carl's rental car is destroyed and Megatron comes to New Jersey to collect energon what will happen when these two meet.

A SatAM-based fanfic detailing Bunnie's partial roboticization - and Antoine's resulting feelings of guilt.
